title: M&G NAME TAG 85MM X 55MM ( HORIZONTAL ) ( 48'S/BOX )
subtitle: M&G NAME TAG 85MM
overview: Our M&G horizontal name tag is a convenient and practical accessory for any professional event or office environment. Measuring 85mm X 55mm, it offers ample space for you to display your name or other important information. The name tags come in a box of 48, making them a cost-effective solution for large events or ongoing office use. The tags are easy to attach to clothing, ensuring that they stay in place throughout the day. These horizontal name tags are the perfect choice for anyone who wants to make a professional impression while staying organized and efficient.

title: M&G NAME TAG HANGING ROPE 10MM
subtitle: M&G NAME TAG HANGING
overview: Our M&G 10mm Name Tag Hanging Rope is a durable and reliable accessory that is perfect for use in any professional event or office environment. With its sturdy construction and simple design, this hanging rope is easy to attach to name tags or other identification cards. The rope is long enough to hang comfortably around the neck, ensuring that your name tag stays visible at all times. Whether you're attending a conference, trade show, or other professional event, this name tag hanging rope is an essential accessory that can help you make a great impression.
